/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG     -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eckit_grid.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/eckit_grid.dir/eckit-grid.cc.o" -o ../../bin/eckit-grid  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" ../../lib/libeckit_geo.so ../../lib/libeckit_option.so ../../lib/libeckit_maths.so ../../lib/libeckit_spec.so ../../lib/libeckit_codec.so ../../lib/libeckit.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl
